name: claw-oauth-management
description: OpenClaw extension for automatic OAuth provider switching and credit lifecycle management

monitorIntervalMs.description: Credit monitoring interval in milliseconds (default: 5 minutes)

switchThresholdPercent.description: Switch providers when remaining credits fall below this percentage

providers.description: Ordered list of provider profiles to cycle through

reconcileOnSwitch.description: Run multi-layer reconciliation after each switch
